ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot interacting with a post office, perhaps receiving or sending a package.  The movements should convey careful handling and a sense of responsibility. Frame 1 shows arms at rest. Frame 2 shows the robot extending both arms forward, palms up, as if receiving a package. Frame 3 shows the robot bringing the arms back down to chest level and to the side as if handling the package with care. Frame 4 shows the robot extending both arms forward again, but slightly lower, as if placing the package somewhere. Frame 5 shows the arms returning to a resting position.

frames.beat: arms hang at rest, ready for service
both arms extend forward, palms up, receiving
arms lower to chest, handling the package carefully
arms extend forward again, placing the package down
both arms return to a relaxed, resting position
